mapper.sql: api_id, api_name, api_url, http_method, request_template, response_field, success_condition, headers, timeout, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO external_api_config ( api_id, api_name, api_url, http_method, request_template, response_field, success_condition, headers, timeout, enabled, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{apiId}, #{apiName}, #{apiUrl}, #{httpMethod}, #{requestTemplate}, #{responseField}, #{successCondition}, #{headers}, #{timeout}, #{enabled}, #{description}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE external_api_config SET api_name = #{apiName}, api_url = #{apiUrl}, http_method = #{httpMethod}, request_template = #{requestTemplate}, response_field = #{responseField}, success_condition = #{successCondition}, headers = #{headers}, timeout = #{timeout}, enabled = #{enabled}, description = #{description}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE api_id = #{apiId}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM external_api_config ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM external_api_config WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
